message:
feat(tui,deps): add ftui-tty dependency, implement RawModeGuard Drop, and reformat UI code

- Add ftui-tty crate dependency (v0.2.0 path dep) to Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock
- Implement Drop for RawModeGuard on unix to ensure inner guard is released
  on drop via inner.take()
- Collapse single-statement command builder chain in detect_terminal_size
  onto one line
- Replace deprecated std::iter::repeat().take(n) with std::iter::repeat_n()
  in sparkline_from_values
- Reformat sparkline BLOCKS array from vertical to horizontal layout
- Reformat closure push_metric from compressed assignment style to standard
  multi-line closure body
- Normalize Span::styled call formatting across analytics footer, status
  bar, and resize handler for consistent line wrapping
- Reformat Paragraph::new wrapping in analytics footer rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
